vBRIEFInfo.author: panopticon-cli/0.0.0
vBRIEFInfo.description: Plan for PAN-697: Reorganize root-level artifacts into professional top-level structure

plan.title: Reorganize root-level artifacts into professional top-level structure
plan.author: agent:claude-opus-4-6

narratives.Problem: The repo root mixes canonical entrypoint files with stray audit reports, historical writeups, and unused screenshots. The top level looks improvised rather than intentional — a poor first impression for anyone opening the repo.
narratives.Proposal: Move the 14 listed artifacts into purpose-specific homes under docs/ using git mv (audits -> docs/audits/, historical writeups -> docs/history/, screenshots -> docs/screenshots/root-cleanup/). Update the one internal reference in docs/AGENT_TYPES_INDEX.md. Document the root-directory policy in docs/REPO-ARTIFACTS.md. No source-code reorg, no content rewrites.

items.title: Move root audit artifacts to docs/audits/

narrative.Action: Create docs/audits/ and git mv the three audit/investigation artifacts (AGENT_AUDIT_REPORT.md, BUGS_FOUND.md, gemini-gaps-found.md) from the repo root into it. Use git mv to preserve history. Do not modify file contents.

subItems.title: docs/audits/ directory exists and contains AGENT_AUDIT_REPORT.md, BUGS_FOUND.md, and gemini-gaps-found.md
None of AGENT_AUDIT_REPORT.md, BUGS_FOUND.md, or gemini-gaps-found.md exist at the repo root anymore
git log --follow docs/audits/AGENT_AUDIT_REPORT.md shows pre-move history (git mv was used, not delete+add)
File contents are byte-identical to the pre-move versions (no edits during the move)

narrative.Action: Create docs/history/ and git mv the two historical writeups (IMPLEMENTATION_SUMMARY.md, PAN-428-CODEX-FEEDBACK.md) from the repo root into it. Use git mv to preserve history. Do not modify file contents.

subItems.title: docs/history/ directory exists and contains IMPLEMENTATION_SUMMARY.md and PAN-428-CODEX-FEEDBACK.md
Neither IMPLEMENTATION_SUMMARY.md nor PAN-428-CODEX-FEEDBACK.md exists at the repo root anymore
git log --follow on each moved file shows pre-move history (git mv was used)
File contents are byte-identical to the pre-move versions

narrative.Action: Create docs/screenshots/root-cleanup/ and git mv all nine root-level PNG screenshots (command-deck-full.png, command-deck.png, composer-fullpage.png, composer-visible.png, dashboard-home.png, dropdown-narrow.png, dropdown-open.png, final-dropdown-test.png, normal-viewport.png) into it. Discovery confirmed zero inbound references, so no link updates are required — but verify again after the move with a grep sweep.

subItems.title: docs/screenshots/root-cleanup/ directory exists and contains all nine named PNG files
None of the nine PNG basenames exists at the repo root anymore
Each moved PNG retains its git history via git mv (not delete+add)
Post-move grep for the nine basenames across the repo (excluding node_modules, .venv, .git, .planning, and the PAN-697 spec/plan files) returns no results pointing at the old root paths

items.title: Update the AGENT_AUDIT_REPORT.md reference in docs/AGENT_TYPES_INDEX.md

narrative.Action: Update the one known internal reference to AGENT_AUDIT_REPORT.md in docs/AGENT_TYPES_INDEX.md (line 109 at planning time) so it points at the new path under docs/audits/. Then run a final grep sweep across the repo for the five moved markdown basenames (AGENT_AUDIT_REPORT.md, BUGS_FOUND.md, IMPLEMENTATION_SUMMARY.md, PAN-428-CODEX-FEEDBACK.md, gemini-gaps-found.md) to confirm no other stale references remain outside planning/spec artifacts.

subItems.title: docs/AGENT_TYPES_INDEX.md references AGENT_AUDIT_REPORT.md at its new docs/audits/ path (or as a plain filename reference that is unambiguously correct post-move)

A repo-wide grep for each of the five moved markdown basenames (excluding node_modules, .venv, .git, .planning, docs/prds/active/pan-697/, and the moved files themselves) reveals no references still pointing at the old root location

items.title: Document the repo-root policy in docs/REPO-ARTIFACTS.md

narrative.Action: Extend docs/REPO-ARTIFACTS.md with a new 'Repo root policy' section that states the repo root is reserved for canonical entrypoint docs, standard project metadata, and first-class project directories; that audit artifacts belong under docs/audits/; historical writeups under docs/history/; and screenshots under docs/screenshots/ (with a named subdirectory per batch, e.g. root-cleanup/). Include the explicit allowlist of files that stay at root as documented in the spec.

subItems.title: docs/REPO-ARTIFACTS.md contains a new section titled 'Repo root policy' (or equivalent heading) describing what belongs at the repo root

The new section lists the canonical root-allowed files from the spec (README.md, CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, CONTRIBUTING.md, LICENSE, package.json, bun.lock, bunfig.toml, tsconfig.json, tsdown.config.ts, vitest.config.ts, vitest.workspace.ts, typedoc.json, commitlint.config.js, .gitignore, .gitattributes, .eslintrc.json, .env.remote, introduction.mdx, quickstart.mdx, concepts.mdx)
The new section names the destinations for non-root artifacts: docs/audits/ for audits/investigations, docs/history/ for historical writeups, docs/screenshots/<batch>/ for screenshots

The section includes the rule: 'The repo root is reserved for canonical entrypoint docs, standard project metadata, and first-class project directories. Audit artifacts, screenshots, exploratory writeups, and historical notes must live under a purpose-specific subdirectory.'
